query_title: Goal III: Taking on the World

recommendations.title: The Vault
recommendations.overview: Madrid, Spain, 2010. While the whole city follows the national team's successful participation in the World Cup, a group of daring thieves look for a way into one of the most secure and guarded places on the planet.

recommendations.title: Dance-Off
recommendations.overview: Two cross-town rival dance teams go head to head for the National Nationals Championship.

recommendations.title: Eight Men Out

recommendations.title: Do It Like An Hombre
recommendations.overview: Raúl, Eduardo and Santiago have led a happy and "straight" life since their childhood, until, one day, Santiago confesses to them that he is gay.

recommendations.title: Champions
recommendations.overview: A disgraced basketball coach is given the chance to coach Los Amigos, a team of players who are intellectually disabled, and soon realizes they just might have what it takes to make it to the national championships.

recommendations.title: Back of the Net
recommendations.overview: A new student at a soccer academy is determined to beat her rival's team in the national tournament.

recommendations.title: Dear Santa

recommendations.title: Next Gen
recommendations.genres: Animation, Action, Adventure, Comedy, Family, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: A friendship with a top-secret robot turns a lonely girl's life into a thrilling adventure as they take on bullies, evil bots and a scheming madman.

recommendations.title: Torment

recommendations.title: Glory Road
recommendations.overview: In 1966, Texas Western coach Don Haskins led the first all-black starting line-up for a college basketball team to the NCAA national championship.
